zh.Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gamel Percy於大約1090年出生在英國波藍德蒙卡斯特時，他的父親Alan de Percy 2nd Lord Percy22歲，母親Emma de Gaunt22歲。他於1127年與Ulfsdotter結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1170年在他的家鄉享年81歲。

zh-hans.Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gamel Percy于大约1090年出生在英国波藍德蒙卡斯特时，他的父亲Alan de Percy 2nd Lord Percy22岁，母亲Emma de Gaunt22岁。他于1127年与Ulfsdotter结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1170年在他的家乡享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Gamel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Fanciful spelling of Gail , also occasionally written Gaelle .

variants.name: Gail
meanings: Shortened form of   Abigail .  It was not found as an independent given name before the middle of the 20th century; it became popular in the 1950s and 1960s, but has since fallen out of fashion.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gamel Percy was born about 1090, in Muncaster, Cumberland, England, his father, Alan de Percy 2nd Lord Percy, was 22 and his mother, Emma de Gaunt, was 22. He married Ulfsdotter in 1127. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1170, in his hometown, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gamel Percy est né environ 1090, à Muncaster, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Alan de Percy 2nd Lord Percy, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Emma de Gaunt, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Ulfsdotter en 1127. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1170, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gamel Percy um 1090 in Muncaster, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alan de Percy 2nd Lord Percy 22 und seine Mutter Emma de Gaunt 22. Er hat 1127 Ulfsdotter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1170 im Alter von 81 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gamel Percy è nato il circa 1090 nel Muncaster, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Alan de Percy 2nd Lord Percy, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Gaunt, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Ulfsdotter nel 1127. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1170, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.Muncaster, Cumbria, England: イギリスクウンバーランドムンカスター
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gamel Percyが約1090年にイギリスクウンバーランドムンカスターで生まれた時，父Alan de Percy 2nd Lord Percyは22歳，母Emma de Gauntは22歳であった。1127年にUlfsdotterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1170年に故郷で81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gamel Percy(이)가 대략 1090년 영국 쿠벌랜드 먼카스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan de Percy 2nd Lord Percy(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Gaunt(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1127년 Ulfsdotter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1170년 그의 고향에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gamel Percy nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Muncaster, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan de Percy 2nd Lord Percy, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Gaunt, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Ulfsdotter em 1127. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1170, em sua cidade natal, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gamel Percy родился около 1090 г. в местности мункастир, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Alan de Percy 2nd Lord Percy было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Emma de Gaunt, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Ulfsdotter в 1127 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1170 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gamel Percy nació aproximadamente 1090, en Muncaster, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan de Percy 2nd Lord Percy, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Emma de Gaunt, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ulfsdotter en 1127. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1170, en su pueblo, a la edad de 81 años.
